description_for_human: AI-powered research assistant that transforms project briefs into comprehensive creative research with metaphor discovery, visual style recommendations, and optimized Midjourney prompts.
description_for_model: This skill performs deep research analysis on creative projects. It discovers metaphors across multiple domains, analyzes historical context, recommends visual styles, and generates Midjourney prompts. Use it when users need comprehensive creative research, concept exploration, or AI-generated visual prompts.

functions.name: analyze_concept
functions.description: Deep analysis of project concepts, values, and differentiation

functions.name: discover_metaphors
functions.description: Find metaphors across nature, technology, art, history, and psychology

concept.description: The concept to find metaphors for

domains.description: Domains to search: nature, technology, art, history, psychology

functions.name: analyze_visual_style
functions.description: Recommend visual styles, color palettes, and mood

concept.description: The concept to create prompts for
